name: @eturino/ts-parse-boolean
author: Eduardo Turiño <eturino@eturino.com>
description: Converts to a boolean. Returns false if the value is falsy. If it is truthy it checks it by converting to a string, trimming, upcasing, and checking if the value is not `FALSE` or `NO` or `0`.

scripts.reset: git clean -dfx -e .idea && git reset --hard && pnpm install
scripts.prepare-release: run-s reset test doc:html version doc:publish

scripts-info.info: Display information about the package scripts
scripts-info.fix: Try to automatically fix any linting problems
scripts-info.test: Lint and unit test the project
scripts-info.doc: Generate HTML API documentation and open it in a browser
scripts-info.doc:json: Generate API documentation in typedoc JSON format
scripts-info.version: Bump package.json version, update CHANGELOG.md, tag release
scripts-info.reset: Delete all untracked files (except `.idea`) and reset the repo to the last commit
scripts-info.prepare-release: One-step: clean, build, test, publish docs, and prep a release
